summary: Comprehensive testing of Compatibility/Synastry feature completed. All 20 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including form modal, report list, detail view, mobile responsiveness, and new analysis creation with AI.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/compatibility/analyze creates report with AI analysis (200)
Backend: Analyze returns all required fields (id, partner_name, overall_score, category_scores, synastry_aspects, strengths, challenges, ai_analysis)
Backend: Category scores include romantic, emotional, communication, stability, karmic
Backend: AI analysis text is generated (>50 chars)
Backend: Missing required fields return 422 validation error
Backend: Analyze endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/reports returns user's reports list
Backend: Reports list contains all required fields
Backend: Reports endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/compatibility/reports/{id} returns specific report details
Backend: Nonexistent report returns 404
Backend: Report detail endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Aries (Mar 25) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Taurus (Apr 22) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Gemini (Jun 15) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Cancer (Jul 10) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Leo (Aug 15) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Virgo (Sep 10) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Libra (Oct 5) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Scorpio (Nov 10) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Sagittarius (Dec 5) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Capricorn (Jan 5) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Aquarius (Feb 5) correct
Backend: Sun sign calculation - Pisces (Mar 5) correct
Frontend: Compatibility page loads at /compatibility route
Frontend: Compatibility link with Heart icon in sidebar
Frontend: Reports list shows existing reports with partner name, sun sign, percentage, date
Frontend: New Analysis button opens form modal
Frontend: Form has all required fields (name, date, time, place)
Frontend: Form fields have proper data-testid attributes
Frontend: Report detail shows overall score ring (90%, 83%, etc)
Frontend: Report detail shows You vs Partner comparison
Frontend: Category scores displayed (Romance, Emotional, Communication, Stability, Karmic)
Frontend: Strengths section with synastry aspects
Frontend: Growth Areas section displayed
Frontend: AI Relationship Analysis section with comprehensive text
Frontend: New analysis submission works end-to-end
Frontend: Success toast displayed after analysis
Frontend: New report appears in list after creation
Frontend: Mobile responsive - reports list displays properly
Frontend: Mobile responsive - detail view accessible via scroll
Frontend: Element compatibility description displayed
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed compatibility reports during pytest execution for sun sign validation. UI test created UI_TEST_Partner report.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compatibility feature is fully working. User has 16 reports including Jane Smith (Leo, 83%), Sarah Connor (Pisces, 90%), and various TEST_ prefixed reports. AI analysis uses GPT-4o and takes ~10-15 seconds to generate comprehensive relationship analysis. Mobile view stacks reports list above detail view. Form validation works correctly - requires name, birth date, and birth place.
